calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-17-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christine James, via ZOOM, for Deanna Montgomery, Administrator.

The court queries counsel regarding the efforts in selling the estate's real property. Counsel reports that she came on late in this matter, that the real property had been inherited by four sisters who are now all deceased and the property has been sold to creditor HGFC. The court points to some requests in the proposed order that are questionable but that it intends to take the matter under submission.

The Order to Appear is off calendar. The Accounting Petition is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-07-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-31-2022 Continued To Mar-07-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Christine James to appear on Mar-07-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition To Approve Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-27-2021 Continued To Feb-24-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christine Jones appeared by zoom for Deanna Montgomery (Petitioner).

Ms. Jones stated that she was just brought into the case a few days ago, that prior Counsel filed a petition for final distribution, but didn't get a hearing date, that she is preparing an amendment to the petition for final distribution and that she will be filing it next week. The Court informed Ms. Jones that the prior petition was taken off calendar and that it should be a brand-new petition for final distribution. Status on close of estate is continued to February 24, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jul-29-2020 Continued To Oct-07-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anthony Danielson appeared by zoom for Deanna Montgomery.

The Court asked Mr. Danielson why he hasn't responded to the Probate Examiner's notes. Mr. Danielson provided background, stated that the Administrator came in to address a creditor's claim to resolve the issue with the real property, that they don't know the heirs and that they have 38 intestate heirs in the East Coast, Ireland, Germany and the United Kingdom. Mr. Danielson also spoke of the notice requirement for the covid continuances, stated that the costs of each international service is $250.00 and that he would like a date certain. In addition, Mr. Danielson stated that in the meantime he will be working on the other issues in the notes and that the identities of the heirs transforms every two weeks when they get notice that so and so has passed away. The First and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. is continued to October 7, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-25-2019 Continued To Dec-23-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on December 23, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anthony Danielson for Deanna Montgomery (Petitioner) via CourtCall

Mr. Danielson stated that the decedent was one of the four sisters (all deceased) holding title to a vacant residential real property, one of the sister's estate was probated, that his client has 5% interest in the property, and the parcel will be sold at a tax sale. Mr. Danielson also spoke of the efforts regarding notice, i.e., doing a full blown credit check, diligently tracking down heirs, spent $200.00 on postage, and having contact with 3rd/4th degree relatives in Ireland. The Court granted the Amended Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Status on filing of Petition for Final Distribution set for November 25, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-20-2018 Continued To Apr-03-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anthony Danielson appeared by telephone for Deanna Montgomery.

The Court stated that it does not have responses to the Probate Examiner's notes. Mr. Danielson stated that the principal issue is that there are intestate heirs all over the Country of Ireland and that they do not have good contact information as to who are the heirs and who aren't. Mr. Danielson also stated that they are in the course of obtaining information and requested a 45-day continuance to determine who the heirs are and who needs notice. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to April 3, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel is reminded to not overlook the other issues that are raised in the Examiner's notes.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
